<code>
# Generated by Django 5.2.8 on 2026-03-10 07:09

import django.db.models.deletion
from django.conf import settings
from django.db import migrations, models


class Migration(migrations.Migration):

    initial = True

    dependencies = [
        migrations.swappable_dependency(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL),
    ]

    operations = [
        migrations.CreateModel(
            name='SystemSetting',
            fields=[
                ('id', models.BigAutoField(auto_created=True, primary_key=True, serialize=False, verbose_name='ID')),
                ('key', models.CharField(max_length=100, unique=True)),
                ('value', models.CharField(max_length=255)),
                ('description', models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)),
            ],
        ),
        migrations.CreateModel(
            name='ActivityLog',
            fields=[
                ('id', models.BigAutoField(auto_created=True, primary_key=True, serialize=False, verbose_name='ID')),
                ('action', models.CharField(max_length=255)),
                ('ip_address', models.GenericIPAddressField(blank=True, null=True)),
                ('created_at', models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)),
                ('user', models.ForeignKey(blank=True, null=True, on_delete=django.db.models.deletion.SET_NULL, to=settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL)),
            ],
        ),
        migrations.CreateModel(
            name='Notification',
            fields=[
                ('id', models.BigAutoField(auto_created=True, primary_key=True, serialize=False, verbose_name='ID')),
                ('title', models.CharField(max_length=200)),
                ('message', models.TextField()),
                ('is_read', models.BooleanField(default=False)),
                ('created_at', models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)),
                ('user', models.ForeignKey(blank=True, help_text='Leave blank to send to all users', null=True, on_delete=django.db.models.deletion.CASCADE, to=settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL)),
            ],
        ),
    ]

</code>

custom_admin\migrations\0002_alter_notification_options_notification_category_and_more.py:
<code>
# Generated by Django 5.2.8 on 2026-03-25 16:51

import django.db.models.deletion
from django.conf import settings
from django.db import migrations, models


class Migration(migrations.Migration):

    dependencies = [
        ('custom_admin', '0001_initial'),
        migrations.swappable_dependency(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL),
    ]

    operations = [
        migrations.AlterModelOptions(
            name='notification',
            options={'ordering': ['-created_at']},
        ),
        migrations.AddField(
            model_name='notification',
            name='category',
            field=models.CharField(choices=[('TRADE', 'Trade Activity'), ('SUBSCRIPTION', 'Membership'), ('SYSTEM', 'System Alert')], default='SYSTEM', max_length=20),
        ),
        migrations.AlterField(
            model_name='notification',
            name='user',
            field=models.ForeignKey(blank=True, null=True, on_delete=django.db.models.deletion.CASCADE, to=settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL),
        ),
    ]

</code>

custom_admin\migrations\0003_remove_notification_category_notification_type_and_more.py:
<code>
# Generated by Django 5.2.8 on 2026-03-26 15:10

import django.db.models.deletion
from django.conf import settings
from django.db import migrations, models


class Migration(migrations.Migration):

    dependencies = [
        ('custom_admin', '0002_alter_notification_options_notification_category_and_more'),
        migrations.swappable_dependency(settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL),
    ]

    operations = [
        migrations.RemoveField(
            model_name='notification',
            name='category',
        ),
        migrations.AddField(
            model_name='notification',
            name='type',
            field=models.CharField(choices=[('buy', 'Buy Order'), ('sell', 'Sell Order'), ('membership', 'Membership'), ('system', 'System')], default='system', max_length=20),
        ),
        migrations.AlterField(
            model_name='notification',
            name='user',
            field=models.ForeignKey(blank=True, help_text='Leave blank to send to all users', null=True, on_delete=django.db.models.deletion.CASCADE, related_name='notifications', to=settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL),
        ),
    ]

</code>

                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap">
            <p class="mb-0 text-secondary" style="font-size: 12px;">© 2026 <strong>NepseSewa Admin</strong>. Secure Financial Operations.</p>
            <p class="mb-0 text-secondary" style="font-size: 12px;"><i class='bx bx-map me-1'></i>Kathmandu, Nepal | Internal Use Only</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</footer>

    /* Professional Layout Styles */
    footer.admin-footer {
        background-color: #ffffff;
        border-top: 1px solid #edf2f7;
        margin-top: auto;
    }

    .footer-heading {
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 800;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 1.2px;
        color: #1a202c; 
        margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: 0;
    }

    .footer-links li {
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .footer-links a {
        color: #718096;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-size: 13.5px;
        font-weight: 500;
        transition: color 0.2s ease;
    }

    .footer-links a:hover {
        color: #008cff;
    }

    .copyright-bar {
        background-color: #f7fafc; 
        border-top: 1px solid #edf2f7;
    }

    /* Column Dividers for Desktop */
    @media (min-width: 992px) {
        .col-lg-2 {
            border-left: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
            padding-left: 25px;
        }
    }
</style>

                </div>

                    <span class="small fw-medium">Multi-Factor Auth Enabled</span>
                </div>
            </div>

                <h6 class="fw-bold text-muted small text-uppercase mb-3">Security Settings</h6>
                <p class="text-muted small mb-3">Keep your admin credentials secure. It is recommended to update your password every 90 days.</p>

                        <i class='bx bx-refresh me-1'></i> Change Account Password
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RIGHT COLUMN (System Metadata) -->
        <div class="col-lg-8">
            <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 overflow-hidden">
                <div class="card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 d-flex align-items-center">

                            <div>
                                <span class="d-block text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold mb-1">Internal Database ID</span>
                                <span class="fw-mono text-dark">#USR-{{ user.id|add:"1000" }}</span>
                            </div>
                            <i class='bx bx-lock-alt text-muted fs-4'></i>
                        </li>

                        <!-- Fixed Username -->
                        <li class="list-group-item p-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center bg-light-subtle">
                            <div>
                                <span class="d-block text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold mb-1">Fixed System Username</span>
                                <span class="fw-bold text-dark">{{ user.username }}</span>
                            </div>
                            <span class="badge bg-secondary">Immutable</span>
                        </li>

                        <!-- Primary Email -->
                        <li class="list-group-item p-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <span class="d-block text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold mb-1">Registered Email Address</span>
                                <span class="text-dark">{{ user.email }}</span>
                            </div>
                            <i class='bx bx-envelope text-muted fs-4'></i>
                        </li>

                        <!-- Security Roles -->

                            <div>
                                <span class="d-block text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold mb-1">Security Permissions</span>

                                    <span class="badge bg-soft-primary text-primary border border-primary-subtle">is_staff</span>

                        </li>

                                <span class="text-dark">{{ user.date_joined|date:"F d, Y" }}</span>
                                <small class="text-muted d-block" style="font-size: 11px;">at {{ user.date_joined|date:"P" }} (System Time)</small>
                            </div>
                            <i class='bx bx-calendar text-muted fs-4'></i>
                        </li>

                        <!-- Last Login Record -->
                        <li class="list-group-item p-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                            <div>
                                <span class="d-block text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold mb-1">Last Secure Login</span>
                                <span class="text-dark">{{ user.last_login|date:"M d, Y" }}</span>
                                <small class="text-muted d-block" style="font-size: 11px;">from Session ID: {{ request.session.session_key|truncatechars:15 }}</small>
                            </div>
                            <i class='bx bx-history text-muted fs-4'></i>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer bg-light p-3 text-center border-top-0">
                    <p class="mb-0 text-muted" style="font-size: 12px;">
                        <i class='bx bx-info-circle me-1'></i> Identity records are locked by system policy. Please contact the lead developer to request modifications.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

custom_admin\templates\custom_admin\generic_form.html:
<code>
{% extends 'custom_admin/panel_base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    /* Auto-style all generated Django form inputs to Bootstrap 5 OneDash style */
    form input[type="text"], form input[type="email"], form input[type="number"], form input[type="password"], form select, form textarea, form input[type="file"] {
        display: block; 
        width: 100%; 
        padding: 0.5rem 1rem; 
        font-size: 14px; 
        font-weight: 400; 
        line-height: 1.5; 
        color: #4c5258; 
        background-color: #fff; 
        background-clip: padding-box; 
        border: 1px solid #ced4da; 
        appearance: none; 
        border-radius: 6px; 
        transition: border-color .15s ease-in-out,box-shadow .15s ease-in-out;
    }
    form input[type="text"]:focus, form input[type="email"]:focus, form input[type="number"]:focus, form select:focus, form textarea:focus {
        border-color: #80c6ff;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgb(0 140 255 / 25%);
        outline: 0;
    }
    form input[type="checkbox"] { 
        width: 40px; 
        height: 20px; 
        cursor: pointer;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block panel_content %}
<div class="row">
    <div class="col-12 col-lg-8 mx-auto">
        <div class="card radius-10 border-top border-0 border-4 border-primary">
            <div class="card-body p-5">
                <div class="card-title d-flex align-items-center mb-4">
                    <div><i class='bx bxs-file-plus me-2 fs-4 text-primary'></i></div>
                    <h5 class="mb-0 text-primary fw-bold">{{ page_title }}</h5>
                </div>
                <hr>
                
                <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="mt-4">
                    {% csrf_token %}
                    
                    {% for field in form %}
                        <div class="mb-4">
                            <label class="form-label fw-semibold text-secondary small text-uppercase" style="letter-spacing: 0.5px;">{{ field.label }}</label>
                            {% if field.field.widget.input_type == 'checkbox' %}
                                <div class="form-check form-switch mt-2">
                                    {{ field }}
                                </div>
                            {% else %}
                                {{ field }}
                            {% endif %}
                            
                            {% if field.help_text %}
                                <div class="form-text small opacity-75 mt-2"><i class='bx bx-info-circle'></i> {{ field.help_text }}</div>
                            {% endif %}
                            
                            {% if field.errors %}
                                <div class="text-danger small mt-2 fw-medium"><i class='bx bx-error-circle'></i> {{ field.errors|striptags }}</div>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    {% endfor %}
                    
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2 mt-5">
                        <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' app_name model_name %}" class="btn btn-light px-4 border rounded-pill">Cancel</a>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary px-4 rounded-pill d-flex align-items-center"><i class='bx bx-save me-2'></i> Save Changes</button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

</code>

custom_admin\templates\custom_admin\generic_list.html:
<code>
{% extends 'custom_admin/panel_base.html' %}
{% load admin_tags %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .table-custom th {
        background-color: #f8f9fa;
        color: #4c5258;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        font-size: 13px;
        padding: 15px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #ebedf2;
    }
    .table-custom td {
        padding: 15px;
        vertical-align: middle;
        color: #4c5258;
        font-size: 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #ebedf2;
    }
    .btn-action {
        width: 32px;
        height: 32px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 6px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-action i {
        font-size: 16px;
    }
    .btn-action-edit {
        color: #0dceec;
        background-color: rgb(13 206 236 / 15%);
    }
    .btn-action-edit:hover {
        background-color: #0dceec;
        color: #fff;
    }
    .btn-action-delete {
        color: #fd3550;
        background-color: rgb(253 53 80 / 15%);
    }
    .btn-action-delete:hover {
        background-color: #fd3550;
        color: #fff;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block panel_content %}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <h5 class="mb-0 fw-bold">{{ page_title }}</h5>
    <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_create' app_name model_name %}" class="btn btn-primary shadow-sm rounded-pill px-4"><i class='bx bx-plus me-1'></i> Add New</a>
</div>

{% if filters_config %}
<div class="card radius-10 border-0 shadow-sm mb-4">
    <div class="card-body p-3">
        <form method="GET" class="row g-3 align-items-end">
            <!-- Keep global search if q exists -->
            <input type="hidden" name="q" value="{{ active_filters.q|default:'' }}">
            <input type="hidden" name="sort" value="{{ current_sort|default:'' }}">
            
            {% for cfg in filters_config %}
            <div class="col-md-2">
                <label class="form-label small text-muted mb-1">{{ cfg.label }}</label>
                {% if cfg.type == 'select' %}
                <select name="{{ cfg.name }}" class="form-select form-select-sm">
                    {% for val, lab in cfg.options %}
                    <option value="{{ val }}" {% if active_filters|get_item:cfg.name == val|stringformat:"s" %}selected{% endif %}>{{ lab }}</option>
                    {% endfor %}
                </select>
                {% elif cfg.type == 'date' %}
                <input type="date" name="{{ cfg.name }}" class="form-control form-control-sm" value="{{ active_filters|get_item:cfg.name|default:'' }}">
                {% elif cfg.type == 'number' %}
                <input type="number" name="{{ cfg.name }}" class="form-control form-control-sm" placeholder="{{ cfg.label }}" value="{{ active_filters|get_item:cfg.name|default:'' }}">
                {% else %}
                <input type="text" name="{{ cfg.name }}" class="form-control form-control-sm" placeholder="{{ cfg.label }}" value="{{ active_filters|get_item:cfg.name|default:'' }}">
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
            
            <div class="col-md-3 d-flex gap-2">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary flex-grow-1 rounded-pill px-3">Apply Filters</button>
                <a href="?" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary flex-grow-1 rounded-pill px-3">Reset</a>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<div class="card radius-10 w-100">
    <div class="card-header bg-transparent border-bottom-0 pt-4 px-4 pb-0 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
        <h6 class="mb-0 fw-bold">Records List</h6>
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
            <!-- Small Search for current list -->
            <form method="GET" class="input-group" style="width: 250px;">
                {% for key, value in active_filters.items %}
                    {% if key != 'q' %}
                        <input type="hidden" name="{{ key }}" value="{{ value }}">
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}
                <input type="text" name="q" class="form-control form-control-sm border-end-0" placeholder="Search keywords..." value="{{ active_filters.q|default:'' }}">
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm border border-start-0 bg-transparent text-muted"><i class='bx bx-search'></i></button>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body px-0 pt-3 pb-0">
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover table-custom mb-0">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        {% for header in headers %}
                            {% if header|lower != 'id' %} <!-- Skip ID column in Header -->
                            <th>
                                <a href="?{% if current_sort == header %}{% url_replace request 'sort' '-'|add:header %}{% else %}{% url_replace request 'sort' header %}{% endif %}" class="text-decoration-none text-dark d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between">
                                    {{ header|title|replace:"_, " }}
                                    <i class='bx {% if current_sort == header %}bx-sort-up text-primary{% elif current_sort == "-"|add:header %}bx-sort-down text-primary{% else %}bx-sort-alt text-muted{% endif %} ms-1'></i>
                                </a>
                            </th>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}
                        <th class="text-end pe-4">Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for obj in objects %}
                        <tr>
                            {% for field in fields %}
                                {% if field|lower != 'id' %} <!-- Skip ID column in Data -->
                                <td>
                                    {% if 'is_' in field or '_active' in field %}
                                        {% if obj|get_attribute:field %}
                                            <span class="badge border-0 bg-light-success text-success rounded-pill px-3">Active</span>
                                        {% else %}
                                            <span class="badge border-0 bg-light-danger text-danger rounded-pill px-3">Inactive</span>
                                        {% endif %}
                                    {% elif field == 'status' %}
                                        <span class="badge border-0 bg-light-{% if obj.status == 'COMPLETED' or obj.status == 'FILLED' or obj.status == 'OPEN' %}primary{% elif obj.status == 'PENDING' or obj.status == 'PARTIAL' %}warning{% else %}danger{% endif %} text-{% if obj.status == 'COMPLETED' or obj.status == 'FILLED' or obj.status == 'OPEN' %}primary{% elif obj.status == 'PENDING' or obj.status == 'PARTIAL' %}warning{% else %}danger{% endif %} rounded-pill px-3">
                                            {{ obj.status }}
                                        </span>
                                    {% else %}
                                        {{ obj|get_attribute:field|truncatechars:50|default:"-" }}
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                                {% endif %}
                            {% endfor %}
                            <td class="text-end pe-4">
                                <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                                    <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_edit' app_name model_name obj.pk %}" class="btn-action btn-action-edit text-decoration-none" title="Edit"><i class='bx bxs-edit'></i></a>
                                    <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_delete' app_name model_name obj.pk %}" class="btn-action btn-action-delete text-decoration-none" onclick="return confirm('Delete this record?');" title="Delete"><i class='bx bxs-trash'></i></a>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    {% empty %}
                        <tr><td colspan="100%" class="text-center py-5 text-muted"><i class='bx bx-info-circle fs-4 mb-2 d-block'></i> No records found matching your filters.</td></tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
    {% if objects.has_other_pages %}
    <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0 px-4 pt-4 pb-4">
        <nav aria-label="Page navigation">
            <ul class="pagination pagination-sm justify-content-end mb-0">
                {% if objects.has_previous %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link rounded-start px-3" href="?{% url_replace request 'page' objects.previous_page_number %}">Previous</a></li>
                {% else %}
                    <li class="page-item disabled"><span class="page-link rounded-start px-3">Previous</span></li>
                {% endif %}

                {% for num in objects.paginator.page_range %}
                    {% if objects.number == num %}
                        <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link px-3">{{ num }}</span></li>
                    {% elif num > objects.number|add:'-3' and num < objects.number|add:'3' %}
                        <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link px-3" href="?{% url_replace request 'page' num %}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                {% if objects.has_next %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link rounded-end px-3" href="?{% url_replace request 'page' objects.next_page_number %}">Next</a></li>
                {% else %}
                    <li class="page-item disabled"><span class="page-link rounded-end px-3">Next</span></li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
    </div>
    {% endif %}
</div>
{% endblock %}
</code>

custom_admin\templates\custom_admin\login.html:
<code>
{% load static %}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Admin Login | NepseSewa ERP</title>
    <!-- Bootstrap 5 CSS -->
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Boxicons -->
    <link href="https://unpkg.com/boxicons@2.1.4/css/boxicons.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --onedash-primary: #008cff;
            --body-bg: #f2f3f9;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--body-bg);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: #4c5258;
        }

        .login-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 0.125rem 0.25rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075);
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 450px;
            border: none;
            border-top: 4px solid var(--onedash-primary);
        }

        .login-header {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px 20px 20px;
        }

        .login-body {
            padding: 20px 40px 40px;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background-color: var(--onedash-primary);
            border-color: var(--onedash-primary);
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            background-color: #0077d9;
            border-color: #0077d9;
        }

        .form-control {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #ced4da;
            padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .form-control:focus {
            border-color: #80c6ff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgb(0 140 255 / 25%);
        }

        .input-group-text {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
            border-color: #ced4da;
            color: #aeb0b4;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

    <div class="login-card">
        <div class="login-header">
            <!-- Logo Container -->
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center"
                style="height: 80px; overflow: visible; margin-bottom: 30px;">
                <img src="{% static 'img/logo.png' %}" alt="NepseSewa Logo"
                    style="height: 40px; width: auto; transform: scale(3.8); transform-origin: center;">
            </div>

            <!-- Professional Subtitle -->
            <p class="text-muted mt-4 mb-0"
                style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;">
                Enterprise Resource Planning
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="login-body">

            {% if messages %}
            {% for message in messages %}
            <div class="alert alert-{% if message.tags == 'error' %}danger{% else %}{{ message.tags }}{% endif %} alert-dismissible fade show small border-0 bg-light shadow-sm"
                role="alert"
                style="border-left: 4px solid var(--onedash-{% if message.tags == 'error' %}danger{% else %}{{ message.tags }}{% endif %}) !important;">
                {{ message }}
                <button type="button" class="btn-close shadow-none" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
            {% endif %}

            <form method="POST">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="form-label fw-semibold text-secondary small">Email Address (Staff)</label>
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <span class="input-group-text border-end-0"><i class='bx bx-envelope fs-5'></i></span>
                        <input type="email" name="email" class="form-control border-start-0 ps-0"
                            placeholder="admin@nepsesewa.com" required>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="form-label fw-semibold text-secondary small">Password</label>
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <span class="input-group-text border-end-0"><i class='bx bx-lock-alt fs-5'></i></span>
                        <input type="password" name="password" class="form-control border-start-0 ps-0"
                            placeholder="Enter your password" required>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100 fw-semibold py-2 shadow-sm rounded-pill mt-2">Secure
                    Login</button>

                <div class="text-center mt-4">
                    <a href="/" class="text-muted text-decoration-none small"><i class='bx bx-arrow-back me-1'></i>
                        Return to User Site</a>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
</body>

</html>
</code>

custom_admin\templates\custom_admin\panel_base.html:
<code>
{% load static %}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{{ page_title }} | NepseSewa Admin</title>
    <!-- Bootstrap 5 CSS -->
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Boxicons -->
    <link href="https://unpkg.com/boxicons@2.1.4/css/boxicons.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    {% block extra_css %}{% endblock %}
    <style>
        :root {
            --onedash-primary: #008cff;
            --onedash-secondary: #6c757d;
            --onedash-success: #15ca20;
            --onedash-info: #0dceec;
            --onedash-warning: #ffc107;
            --onedash-danger: #fd3550;
            --onedash-light: #f7f7fa;
            --onedash-dark: #212529;
            --sidebar-bg: #ffffff;
            --sidebar-text: #4c5258;
            --sidebar-hover-bg: rgb(0 140 255 / 8%);
            --sidebar-hover-text: #008cff;
            --body-bg: #f2f3f9;
            --card-border-radius: 10px;
            --card-shadow: 0 0.125rem 0.25rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075);
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--body-bg);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            color: #4c5258;
        }

        /* Sidebar Navigation */
        .sidebar {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 250px;
            height: 100vh;
            background: var(--sidebar-bg);
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            box-shadow: 0 0.125rem 0.25rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075);
            border-right: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .sidebar-brand {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            height: 60px;
            color: var(--onedash-primary);
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-decoration: none;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
        }

        .sidebar-brand i {
            font-size: 28px;
            margin-right: 8px;
        }

        .menu-title {
            color: #a4abc5;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-weight: 600;
            padding: 20px 30px 5px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        .sidebar-brand {
            padding: 15px;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            /* Optional: adds a slight separation from the menu */
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f1f1;
        }

        .sidebar-brand img {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .sidebar-brand:hover img {
            transform: scale(1.05);
            /* Slight zoom effect on hover */
        }

        .sidebar-nav {
            padding: 10px 0;
            list-style: none;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .sidebar-nav li {
            padding: 2px 15px;
        }

        .sidebar a {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 10px 15px;
            color: var(--sidebar-text);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            border-radius: 8px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .sidebar a i {
            font-size: 20px;
            margin-right: 10px;
            color: #aeb0b4;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .sidebar a:hover,
        .sidebar a.active {
            color: var(--sidebar-hover-text);
            background: var(--sidebar-hover-bg);
        }

        .sidebar a:hover i,
        .sidebar a.active i {
            color: var(--sidebar-hover-text);
        }

        /* Main Content Wrapper */
        .main-wrapper {
            margin-left: 250px;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        /* Topbar Header */
        .topbar {
            height: 60px;
            background: #ffffff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 20px;
            justify-content: space-between;
            box-shadow: 0 0.125rem 0.25rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075);
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 999;
        }

        .nav-icon {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #4c5258;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }

        .nav-icon:hover {
            background: #f2f3f9;
        }

        /* Page Content */
        .page-content {
            padding: 24px;
            flex-grow: 1;
        }

        .page-breadcrumb {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }

        .breadcrumb-title {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin: 0;
            color: #4c5258;
            border-right: 1px solid #e9ecef;
            padding-right: 15px;
            margin-right: 15px;
        }

        /* --- AJAX Live Search & Notifications Styles --- */
        .notification-dropdown {
            width: 360px;
            max-height: 420px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }

        .notif-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f2f3f9;
            padding: 16px;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
        }

        .notif-item:hover {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
        }

        .notif-unread {
            background-color: #f4f8fc;
        }

        .notif-unread::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 4px;
            background-color: var(--onedash-primary);
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .notif-icon {
            width: 42px;
            height: 42px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .icon-soft-primary {
            background: rgba(0, 140, 255, 0.1);
            color: var(--onedash-primary);
        }

        .icon-soft-success {
            background: rgba(21, 202, 32, 0.1);
            color: var(--onedash-success);
        }

        .icon-soft-danger {
            background: rgba(253, 53, 80, 0.1);
            color: var(--onedash-danger);
        }

        .icon-soft-warning {
            background: rgba(255, 193, 7, 0.12);
            color: #d39e00;
        }

        .notif-text-truncate {
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }

        #search-results {
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1050;
            display: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

    <!-- Sidebar Navigation (FULL RESTORE) -->
    <div class="sidebar">
        <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_trading_dashboard' %}"
            class="sidebar-brand d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center"
            style="height: 85px; background-color: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef; overflow: visible;">
            <!-- translateY(5px) gently pulls the logo down so the arrow isn't cut off -->
            <img src="{% static 'img/logo.png' %}" alt="NepseSewa Logo"
                style="height: 70px; width: auto; object-fit: contain; transform: scale(1.7) translateY(5px);">
        </a>

        <ul class="sidebar-nav">
            <li class="menu-title">Core Engine</li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_trading_dashboard' %}"><i class='bx bx-home-circle'></i>
                    Dashboard</a></li>

            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'TradeExecution' %}"><i class='bx bx-transfer'></i>
                    Executions</a></li>

            <li class="menu-title">Market Intel</li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'Stock' %}"><i class='bx bx-buildings'></i> Stocks

            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'Sector' %}"><i class='bx bx-category'></i>
                    Sectors</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'NEPSEPrice' %}"><i class='bx bx-trending-up'></i>
                    Live Scrapes</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'StockRecommendation' %}"><i
                        class='bx bx-brain'></i> AI Signals</a></li>

            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'CustomUser' %}"><i class='bx bx-group'></i>

            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'Portfolio' %}"><i

                    Payments</a></li>

                        class='bx bx-purchase-tag'></i> Plans</a></li>

            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'Course' %}"><i class='bx bx-book-reader'></i>
                    Courses</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'CandlestickLesson' %}"><i
                        class='bx bx-chalkboard'></i> Lessons</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'CourseCategory' %}"><i class='bx bx-folder'></i>
                    Categories</a></li>

            <li class="menu-title">System Admin</li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'custom_admin' 'ActivityLog' %}"><i
                        class='bx bx-shield-quarter'></i> Activity Logs</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'custom_admin' 'Notification' %}"><i class='bx bx-bell'></i>
                    Notifications</a></li>
            <li><a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'custom_admin' 'SystemSetting' %}"><i class='bx bx-cog'></i>
                    Global Settings</a></li>
            <!-- Inside your sidebar <ul> -->
            <li class="menu-title">Content</li>
            <li>
                <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'Testimonial' %}">
                    <i class='bx bx-comment-detail'></i> Manage Testimonials
                </a>
            </li>
        </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="main-wrapper">
        <header class="topbar">
            <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                <div class="nav-icon me-3" id="sidebar-toggle-btn"><i class='bx bx-menu'></i></div>
                <!-- Live Search Wrapper -->
                <div class="position-relative d-none d-md-block" style="width: 250px;">
                    <form action="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_search' %}" method="GET" class="input-group rounded"
                        style="background: var(--body-bg);">
                        <span class="input-group-text bg-transparent border-0 pe-1"><i
                                class='bx bx-search fs-5 text-muted'></i></span>
                        <input type="text" id="live-search-input" name="q"
                            class="form-control border-0 bg-transparent shadow-none"
                            placeholder="Search Stocks & Users..." autocomplete="off">
                    </form>
                    <div id="search-results" class="dropdown-menu shadow-lg border-0 w-100 mt-1"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">

                <!-- Notification Dropdown -->
                <div class="dropdown">
                    <div class="nav-icon position-relative" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false"
                        style="cursor: pointer;">
                        <i class='bx bx-bell'></i>
                        <span id="notif-badge"
                            class="position-absolute translate-middle badge rounded-pill bg-danger d-none"
                            style="top: 10px; right: -5px; font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 6px;">0</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end shadow border-0 mt-2 notification-dropdown">
                        <div
                            class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 border-bottom sticky-top bg-white">
                            <h6 class="mb-0 fw-bold">Notifications</h6>
                        </div>
                        <div id="notification-list">
                            <div class="p-3 text-center text-muted small"><i class='bx bx-loader-alt bx-spin'></i>
                                Loading...</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Admin Profile Dropdown -->
                <div class="dropdown">
                    <a href="#" class="d-flex align-items-center text-decoration-none dropdown-toggle"
                        data-bs-toggle="dropdown">

                        <!-- AVATAR IMAGE -->
                        <img src="https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name={% if request.user.username %}{{ request.user.username }}{% else %}Admin{% endif %}&background=008cff&color=fff"
                            alt="Profile" width="45" height="45" class="rounded-circle border shadow-sm">

                        <!-- TEXT DETAILS -->
                        <div class="d-none d-md-block ms-2 text-start">
                            <span class="d-block fw-semibold text-dark" style="font-size: 15px; line-height: 1;">
                                {% if request.user.username %}
                                {{ request.user.username|title }}
                                {% else %}
                                Admin
                                {% endif %}
                            </span>
                            <span class="d-block text-muted" style="font-size: 12px; margin-top: 4px;">Superuser</span>
                        </div>

                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end shadow border-0 mt-2">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center"
                                href="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_profile' %}"><i class='bx bx-user fs-5 me-2'></i>
                                Profile</a></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center"
                                href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'custom_admin' 'SystemSetting' %}"><i
                                    class='bx bx-cog fs-5 me-2'></i> Settings</a></li>
                        <li>
                            <hr class="dropdown-divider">
                        </li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center text-danger"
                                href="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_logout' %}"><i class='bx bx-log-out fs-5 me-2'></i>
                                Logout</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </header>

        <main class="page-content">
            <div class="page-breadcrumb d-flex align-items-center">
                <div class="breadcrumb-title pe-3">{{ page_title }}</div>
            </div>
            {% block panel_content %}{% endblock %}
        </main>
        {% include 'custom_admin/admin_footer.html' %}
    </div>

    <!-- JS Logic -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

            // 1. SIDEBAR TOGGLE & ACTIVE LINK LOGIC
            const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar');
            const mainWrapper = document.querySelector('.main-wrapper');
            const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('sidebar-toggle-btn');

            if (toggleBtn) {
                toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                    if (sidebar.style.left === '0px' || sidebar.style.left === '') {
                        sidebar.style.left = '-250px'; mainWrapper.style.marginLeft = '0';
                    } else {
                        sidebar.style.left = '0px'; mainWrapper.style.marginLeft = '250px';
                    }
                });
            }

            // AJAX URLS
            const searchApiUrl = "{% url 'custom_admin:api_live_search' %}";
            const notifApiUrl = "{% url 'custom_admin:api_notifications' %}";
            const markReadBaseUrl = "{% url 'custom_admin:api_mark_read' 999999 %}".replace('999999/', '');

            // 2. LIVE SEARCH
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('live-search-input');
            const searchResults = document.getElementById('search-results');
            let searchTimeout;
            if (searchInput && searchResults) {
                searchInput.addEventListener('keyup', function (e) {
                    clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
                    const query = e.target.value.trim();
                    if (query.length < 2) { searchResults.style.display = 'none'; return; }
                    searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                        fetch(`${searchApiUrl}?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`)
                            .then(res => res.json())
                            .then(data => {
                                searchResults.innerHTML = '';
                                if (data.results && data.results.length > 0) {
                                    data.results.forEach(item => {
                                        searchResults.innerHTML += `
                                        <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:admin_search' %}?q=${item.title}" class="dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center py-2 border-bottom">
                                            <div class="notif-icon bg-light text-primary me-2" style="width: 35px; height: 35px; font-size: 18px;"><i class='bx ${item.icon}'></i></div>
                                            <div class="d-flex flex-column overflow-hidden w-100">
                                                <span class="text-dark fw-semibold text-truncate" style="font-size: 13.5px;">${item.title}</span>
                                                <span class="text-muted text-truncate" style="font-size: 12px;">${item.subtitle}</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </a>`;
                                    });
                                    searchResults.style.display = 'block';
                                } else { searchResults.innerHTML = `<div class="p-3 text-muted small text-center">No results</div>`; searchResults.style.display = 'block'; }
                            });
                    }, 300);
                });
                document.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (!searchInput.contains(e.target)) searchResults.style.display = 'none'; });
            }

            // 3. NOTIFICATION POLLING
            const notifBadge = document.getElementById('notif-badge');
            const notifList = document.getElementById('notification-list');

            function fetchNotifications() {
                if (!notifList) return;
                fetch(notifApiUrl).then(res => res.json()).then(data => {
                    if (data.unread_count > 0) {
                        notifBadge.textContent = data.unread_count;
                        notifBadge.classList.remove('d-none');
                    } else {
                        notifBadge.classList.add('d-none');
                    }
                    if (!data.notifications || data.notifications.length === 0) {
                        notifList.innerHTML = `<div class="p-4 text-center text-muted small">No notifications</div>`;
                        return;
                    }
                    notifList.innerHTML = '';
                    data.notifications.forEach(notif => {
                        let iconClass = 'bx-bell', iconBg = 'icon-soft-primary';
                        if (notif.title.includes('Match')) { iconClass = 'bx-transfer-alt'; iconBg = 'icon-soft-success'; }
                        else if (notif.type === 'membership') { iconClass = 'bx-crown'; iconBg = 'icon-soft-warning'; }
                        else if (notif.type === 'buy') { iconClass = 'bx-trending-up'; iconBg = 'icon-soft-success'; }
                        else if (notif.type === 'sell') { iconClass = 'bx-trending-down'; iconBg = 'icon-soft-danger'; }

                        const readClass = notif.is_read ? '' : 'notif-unread';
                        notifList.innerHTML += `<div class="notif-item d-flex gap-3 ${readClass}" data-id="${notif.id}">
                            <div class="notif-icon ${iconBg}"><i class='bx ${iconClass}'></i></div>
                            <div class="w-100">
                                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mb-1">
                                    <h6 class="mb-0 text-dark small fw-bold">${notif.title}</h6>
                                    <small class="text-muted" style="font-size:10px;">${notif.time}</small>
                                </div>
                                <p class="mb-0 text-secondary notif-text-truncate small" style="font-size:12px;">${notif.message}</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>`;
                    });
                }).catch(() => { if (notifList) notifList.innerHTML = `<div class="p-3 text-center text-danger small">Error loading</div>`; });
            }

            // 4. MARK AS READ (Optimistic & Robust)
            if (notifList) {
                notifList.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                    const item = e.target.closest('.notif-item');
                    if (item && item.classList.contains('notif-unread')) {
                        const notifId = item.getAttribute('data-id');

                        // Optimistic removal of blue bar
                        item.classList.remove('notif-unread');

                        function getCookie(name) {
                            let cookieValue = null;
                            if (document.cookie && document.cookie !== '') {
                                const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
                                for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
                                    const cookie = cookies[i].trim();
                                    if (cookie.substring(0, name.length + 1) === (name + '=')) {
                                        cookieValue = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring(name.length + 1));
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            return cookieValue;
                        }
                        const csrftoken = getCookie('csrftoken');

                        fetch(`${markReadBaseUrl}${notifId}/`, {
                            method: 'POST',
                            headers: {
                                'X-CSRFToken': csrftoken,
                                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                            }
                        })
                            .then(res => res.json())
                            .then(data => {
                                if (data.success) {
                                    fetchNotifications(); // Refresh badge count
                                } else {
                                    item.classList.add('notif-unread'); // Server fail, put bar back
                                }
                            })
                            .catch(() => item.classList.add('notif-unread'));
                    }
                });
            }

            // Initialize polling
            fetchNotifications();
            setInterval(fetchNotifications, 15000);
        });
    </script>
    {% block extra_js %}{% endblock %}
</body>

</html>
</code>

custom_admin\templates\custom_admin\panel_dashboard.html:
<code>
{% extends 'custom_admin/panel_base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .radius-10 { border-radius: 10px; }
    .widgets-icons {
        width: 50px;
        height: 50px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 26px;
        border-radius: 10px;
    }
    .bg-light-primary { background-color: rgb(0 140 255 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-primary { color: #008cff !important; }
    .bg-light-success { background-color: rgb(21 202 32 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-success { color: #15ca20 !important; }
    .bg-light-warning { background-color: rgb(255 193 7 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-warning { color: #ffc107 !important; }
    .bg-light-info { background-color: rgb(13 206 236 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-info { color: #0dceec !important; }
    .bg-light-danger { background-color: rgb(253 53 80 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-danger { color: #fd3550 !important; }
    .bg-light-dark { background-color: rgb(33 37 41 / 12%) !important; }
    .text-dark { color: #212529 !important; }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block panel_content %}
<!-- KPI Widgets Row 1 -->
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-xl-4 g-4 mb-4">
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card radius-10 border-start border-0 border-4 border-success h-100">
            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                    <div>
                        <p class="mb-0 text-secondary d-flex align-items-center gap-1">Total Revenue <i class='bx bx-info-circle' title="Completed Transactions"></i></p>
                        <h4 class="my-1 text-success">Rs {{ revenue|floatformat:2 }}</h4>
                        <p class="mb-0 font-13 text-muted">
                            <i class='bx {% if revenue_growth >= 0 %}bxs-up-arrow text-success{% else %}bxs-down-arrow text-danger{% endif %} align-middle'></i> 
                            {{ revenue_growth|floatformat:1 }}% from last week
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="widgets-icons bg-light-success text-success ms-auto"><i class='bx bx-wallet'></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

            </div>

                        <h4 class="my-1 {% if market_status == 'OPEN' %}text-success{% else %}text-danger{% endif %}">{{ market_status }}</h4>
                        <p class="mb-0 font-13 text-muted">Current NEPSE phase</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="widgets-icons {% if market_status == 'OPEN' %}bg-light-success text-success{% else %}bg-light-danger text-danger{% endif %} ms-auto"><i class='bx bx-time-five'></i></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

            <div class="card-body">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between">

                    </a>

                        {% if recommendation_running %}Stop Recommendation{% else %}Run Recommendation{% endif %}
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

    </div>
</div>

<!-- Recent Data Tables -->
<div class="row g-4">
    <div class="col-12 col-xl-4">
        <div class="card radius-10 w-100 h-100 border-0 shadow-sm">
            <div class="card-header bg-transparent border-bottom pt-4 px-4 pb-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                    <i class='bx bx-time-five fs-4 text-info'></i>
                    <h6 class="mb-0 fw-bold">Recent Trades</h6>
                </div>
                <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'TradeExecution' %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light rounded-pill border shadow-none px-3">View All</a>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body p-0">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                        <thead class="bg-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 ps-4">User</th>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3">Stock</th>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 pe-4 text-end">Amt</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for trade in recent_trades %}
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                        <div class="rounded-circle bg-light-primary text-primary d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center fw-bold" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; font-size: 13px;">
                                            {{ trade.buy_order.user.username|make_list|first|upper }}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                                            <span class="fw-semibold text-dark" style="font-size: 14px;">{{ trade.buy_order.user.username }}</span>
                                            <span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 12px;">{{ trade.executed_at|timesince }} ago</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td><span class="badge bg-light text-dark border">{{ trade.symbol }}</span></td>
                                <td class="pe-4 text-end fw-semibold text-dark">Rs {{ trade.executed_price|floatformat:2 }}</td>
                            </tr>
                            {% empty %}
                            <tr><td colspan="3" class="text-center py-4 text-muted">No recent trades</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="col-12 col-xl-4">
        <div class="card radius-10 w-100 h-100 border-0 shadow-sm">
            <div class="card-header bg-transparent border-bottom pt-4 px-4 pb-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                    <i class='bx bx-user-plus fs-4 text-primary'></i>
                    <h6 class="mb-0 fw-bold">New Users</h6>
                </div>
                <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'CustomUser' %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light rounded-pill border shadow-none px-3">View All</a>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body p-0">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                        <thead class="bg-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 ps-4">User Details</th>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 pe-4 text-end">Joined</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for u in recent_users %}
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                        <div class="rounded-circle bg-light-warning text-warning d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center fw-bold" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; font-size: 13px;">
                                            {{ u.username|make_list|first|upper }}
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                                            <span class="fw-semibold text-dark" style="font-size: 14px;">{{ u.username }}</span>
                                            <span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 12px;">{{ u.email }}</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td class="pe-4 text-end">
                                    <span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 13px;">{{ u.date_joined|date:"M d, Y" }}</span>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            {% empty %}
                            <tr><td colspan="2" class="text-center py-4 text-muted">No recent users</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-12 col-xl-4">
        <div class="card radius-10 w-100 h-100 border-0 shadow-sm">
            <div class="card-header bg-transparent border-bottom pt-4 px-4 pb-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                    <i class='bx bx-credit-card fs-4 text-success'></i>
                    <h6 class="mb-0 fw-bold">Recent Payments</h6>
                </div>
                <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_list' 'myapp' 'PaymentTransaction' %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light rounded-pill border shadow-none px-3">View All</a>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body p-0">
                <div class="table-responsive">
                    <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0">
                        <thead class="bg-light">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 ps-4">User</th>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3">Plan</th>
                                <th class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold py-3 pe-4 text-end">Status</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {% for payment in recent_payments %}
                            <tr>
                                <td class="ps-4">
                                    <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                                        <span class="fw-semibold text-dark" style="font-size: 14px;">{{ payment.user.username }}</span>
                                        <span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 12px;">Rs {{ payment.amount }}</span>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="badge bg-light text-primary border">{{ payment.plan.name }}</span>
                                </td>
                                <td class="pe-4 text-end">
                                    {% if payment.status == 'COMPLETED' %}
                                        <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-light-success text-success border border-success border-opacity-25 px-2 py-1">Success</span>
                                    {% elif payment.status == 'FAILED' %}
                                        <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-light-danger text-danger border border-danger border-opacity-25 px-2 py-1">Failed</span>
                                    {% else %}
                                        <span class="badge rounded-pill bg-light-warning text-warning border border-warning border-opacity-25 px-2 py-1">{{ payment.status }}</span>
                                    {% endif %}
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            {% empty %}
                            <tr><td colspan="3" class="text-center py-4 text-muted">No recent payments</td></tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<script>
    // Volume Chart
    const ctxVol = document.getElementById('volumeChart').getContext('2d');
    
    // Creating gradient for the bars
    let gradientPrimary = ctxVol.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 300);
    gradientPrimary.addColorStop(0, '#008cff');
    gradientPrimary.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 140, 255, 0.2)');

    new Chart(ctxVol, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: {
            labels: {{ volume_labels|safe }},
            datasets: [{
                label: 'Traded Volume',
                data: {{ volume_data|safe }},
                backgroundColor: gradientPrimary,
                borderRadius: 6,
                borderSkipped: false,
                barPercentage: 0.5,
                categoryPercentage: 0.5
            }]
        },
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            plugins: { 
                legend: { display: false } 
            },
            scales: {
                y: {
                    beginAtZero: true,
                    grid: { color: "#f2f2f2", drawBorder: false },
                    border: { display: false }
                },
                x: {
                    grid: { display: false, drawBorder: false },
                    border: { display: false }
                }
            }
        }
    });

    // Trend Chart
    const ctxTrend = document.getElementById('trendsChart').getContext('2d');
    
    let gradientTrend = ctxTrend.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 300);
    gradientTrend.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(21, 202, 32, 0.4)');
    gradientTrend.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(21, 202, 32, 0)');

    new Chart(ctxTrend, {
        type: 'line',
        data: {
            labels: {{ trend_labels|safe }},
            datasets: [{
                label: 'Index Value',
                data: {{ trend_data|safe }},
                borderColor: '#15ca20',
                backgroundColor: gradientTrend,
                borderWidth: 3,
                tension: 0.4,
                pointBackgroundColor: '#fff',
                pointBorderColor: '#15ca20',
                pointBorderWidth: 2,
                pointRadius: 4,
                fill: true
            }]
        },
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            plugins: { 
                legend: { display: false } 
            },
            scales: {
                y: {
                    grid: { color: "#f2f2f2", drawBorder: false },
                    border: { display: false }
                },
                x: {
                    grid: { display: false, drawBorder: false },
                    border: { display: false }
                }
            }
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% extends 'custom_admin/panel_base.html' %}

{% block panel_content %}
<div class="card radius-10 border-0 shadow-sm">
    <div class="card-body p-4">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center mb-4">
            <h5 class="mb-0 fw-bold">Search Results for "{{ query }}"</h5>
            <span class="ms-3 badge bg-light text-dark border">{{ total_results }} items found</span>
        </div>

        {% if user_results %}
        <h6 class="text-uppercase text-secondary font-13 fw-semibold mb-3">Users</h6>
        <div class="table-responsive mb-4">
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle">
                <thead class="bg-light">

                        <th>Username</th>

                        <th>Joined</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>

                        <td>{{ u.date_joined|date:"M d, Y" }}</td>
                        <td>
                            <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_edit' 'myapp' 'CustomUser' u.id %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light border">Edit</a>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        <div class="table-responsive mb-4">

                        <th>Company</th>

                            <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_edit' 'myapp' 'Stock' s.id %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light border">Edit</a>
                        </td>

            </table>
        </div>

                    </tr>
                </thead>

                        <td>{{ o.user.username }}</td>
                        <td>{{ o.symbol }}</td>
                        <td>{{ o.side }} / {{ o.order_type }}</td>
                        <td><span class="badge {% if o.status == 'OPEN' %}bg-light-info text-info{% else %}bg-light-secondary text-secondary{% endif %}">{{ o.status }}</span></td>
                        <td>
                            <a href="{% url 'custom_admin:generic_edit' 'myapp' 'Order' o.id %}" class="btn btn-sm btn-light border">View</a>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        {% if not user_results and not stock_results and not order_results %}
        <div class="text-center py-5">
            <i class='bx bx-search-alt fs-1 text-muted opacity-25'></i>
            <p class="mt-3 text-secondary">No results found for your query.</p>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

</code>

custom_admin\templatetags\admin_tags.py:
<code>
from django import template
from django.db.models import Model
import datetime

register = template.Library()

@register.filter
def get_attribute(obj, attr_name):
    """
    Gets an attribute of an object dynamically from a string name.
    Useful for iterating through lists of fields in the generic list template.
    """
    if not hasattr(obj, attr_name):
        return None
    
    value = getattr(obj, attr_name)
    
    # Check if value is a callable (like a get_absolute_url method or related manager)
    if callable(value) and not isinstance(value, type):
        try:
            # We don't want to accidentally call things that mutate state
            # but usually for templates it's safe formatting functions
            value = value()
        except:
            return repr(value)
            
    # Format datetimes nicely
    if isinstance(value, datetime.datetime):
        return value.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    if isinstance(value, datetime.date):
        return value.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
        
    return value
@register.filter
def get_item(dictionary, key):
    """Access dictionary items by key dynamically"""
    return dictionary.get(key)


@register.simple_tag
def url_replace(request, field, value):
    """Safely replace or add a GET parameter while preserving others"""
    dict_ = request.GET.copy()
    dict_[field] = value
    return dict_.urlencode()


@register.filter
def replace(value, arg):
    """
    Standard string replace filter.
    Usage: {{ value|replace:"search,replacement" }}
    """
    if isinstance(value, str):
        args = arg.split(',')
        if len(args) == 2:
            return value.replace(args[0], args[1])
    return value

</code>

custom_admin\apps.py:
